name: ruby-trollop
title: ruby-trollop
description:
command-line argument processing library
Trollop is YAFCLAP --- yet another fine commandline argument processor
for Ruby. Trollop is designed to provide the maximal amount of GNU-style
argument processing in the minimum number of lines of code (for you, the
programmer).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-trollop because command-line argument processing library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-trollop as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-trollop with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-trollop --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
